text:
miwi        2006-12-03 22:15:25 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/p5-Sysadm-Install Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                               pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Sysadm::Install executes shell-like commands performing typical installation
  tasks: Copying files, extracting tarballs, calling make.
  
  Author: Mike Schilli <m@perlmeister.com>
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Sysadm-Install
  
  PR:             ports/105983
  Submitted by:   Christopher Boumenot <boumenot at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.863     +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +43 -0     ports/sysutils/p5-Sysadm-Install/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/sysutils/p5-Sysadm-Install/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/sysutils/p5-Sysadm-Install/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/sysutils/p5-Sysadm-Install/pkg-plist (new)
